# Corpus v0.2 — composition, dedup, nutrition label v2 (Workstream J)

*Generated by `ml/corpus/report_v0_2.py` from the build sidecars (git-ignored under `data/`). Token unit **kreyol-bpe**. Design (chosen at the J0 gate): keep v0.1 frozen, add the NET-NEW J-source survivors register-tagged, and drive authored/register emphasis via **train-mix weights**, not corpus composition. Spec: [../../docs/data.md](../../docs/data.md).*

## Headline

- **219.2M** unique kreyol-bpe tokens (315,804 docs) — from v0.1's 114.3M (**+104.9M net-new**).
- **5.9% non-web-crawl by raw token share** — *lower* than v0.1's ~10% because fineweb-2's ~105M web-crawl tokens (the volume choice) dilute the ratio. This is expected: v0.2 trades raw authored share for a data-limited model's token budget + a register tail.
- Applying the register **mix weights** lifts the authored/register emphasis to **~11% effective share** of the training mixture — real, but **not 30%**. A true 30%-authored mix from this pool would need heavy repetition of the ~13M authored tokens (overfit risk); reaching it cleanly needs permission-route sources (see scoping report §5).
- Registers now present: children, encyclopedic, financial, government, health, immigration, journalism, legal, proverb, religious, tax, web_crawl — v0.1 had only web_crawl + encyclopedic + proverb.

## Composition by register

| register | docs | kreyol-bpe tokens | share | mix weight |
|---|--:|--:|--:|--:|
| web_crawl | 279,616 | 206,349,478 | 94.1% | 1.0× |
| encyclopedic | 35,639 | 11,455,326 | 5.2% | 2.0× |
| religious | 66 | 1,142,480 | 0.5% | 1.0× |
| journalism | 377 | 103,424 | 0.0% | 4.0× |
| tax | 12 | 55,366 | 0.0% | 1.0× |
| legal | 6 | 35,176 | 0.0% | 3.0× |
| financial | 2 | 34,644 | 0.0% | 3.0× |
| immigration | 6 | 24,762 | 0.0% | 1.0× |
| health | 4 | 13,239 | 0.0% | 1.0× |
| children | 40 | 12,791 | 0.0% | 3.0× |
| government | 1 | 654 | 0.0% | 3.0× |
| proverb | 35 | 323 | 0.0% | 1.0× |
| **total** | **315,804** | **219,227,663** | 100% | |

The **mix weight** column is the training-time sampling multiplier (config_v0_2.MIX_WEIGHTS): web-crawl bulk stays at 1×, authored/register registers are upweighted. Effective authored/register share of the mixture = Σ(weightᵣ·tokensᵣ for authored) / Σ(weightᵣ·tokensᵣ) = **~11%** at these weights. Pushing higher means repeating the small authored pool more per epoch (diminishing returns / overfit) — the honest ceiling of a clean-rights corpus without a larger authored source.

## Per-source filter + dedup removals

| source | ingested | junk | langid | dup-vs-v0.1 | kept |
|---|--:|--:|--:|--:|--:|
| voa_nouvel | 378 | 0 | 1 | 0 | **377** |
| fineweb2_hat | 178,792 | 0 | 3,567 | 0 | **175,225** |
| us_federal_pdfs | 33 | 0 | 0 | 0 | **33** |
| cfpb_glossary_family | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | **1** |
| bib_la_1985 | 66 | 0 | 0 | 0 | **66** |
| konstitisyon_1987 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | **1** |
| storybooks_haiti | 40 | 0 | 0 | 0 | **40** |
| *cross-new dedup removed* | | | | | −354 |

**Religious cap**: not triggered (Bib La 1,142,480 ≤ cap 4,384,553 tokens).

## VOA Nouvèl — crawl actuals

- Crawled **2,225 / 39,286** sitemap URLs (descending id, newest-first; resumable).
- **500 PD-clean articles kept**; dropped 1,214 wire (AFP/AP/Reuters), 341 audio/video program pages, 170 topic-redirect stubs.
- Wire-drop rate: **71%** of text articles.
- Publication years in the kept slice: 2024:287, 2025:209.
- Newest articles are held out as **authored_eval_v2** (temporal, never trained).
- **Partial slice** — the crawl is checkpointed/**resumable** (`data/voa/crawl_state.json`); a full pass is ~12 h at ~1 req/s. Recorded exactly what is in; a fuller VOA slice = resume + rebuild.

## fineweb-2 hat — net-new verdict

Ingested the survivors: raw 159.29M → **net-new 108.49M kreyol-bpe** (68% of raw; only 17% doc-overlap with v0.1). The survey's "heavy MADLAD overlap" expectation was **refuted** — fineweb-2 is a large NEW web-crawl source. Held at mix weight 1× (volume, same register as MADLAD; does not inflate the authored share).

## Federal PDF harvest (J2)

Ingested **33 docs** (439,207 chars) across producers; IRS Pub 850 pairs mined: **374**.

| producer | docs | chars | failed |
|---|--:|--:|--:|
| cfpb | 2 | 92,250 | 0 |
| cms | 2 | 9,179 | 0 |
| dhs_oido | 7 | 10,704 | 0 |
| epa | 2 | 30,853 | 0 |
| irs | 12 | 191,427 | 0 |
| osha | 6 | 19,190 | 0 |
| uscis | 2 | 85,604 | 0 |

Spot-check samples (first per producer) are recorded in `federal_stats.json`. Registers: health / immigration / tax / disaster / financial / government (17 U.S.C. §105 public domain).

## Family-contributed set (J3) — per-file outcomes

| file | verdict | outcome |
|---|---|---|
| CFPB glossary | TRAIN-OK (federal PD) | train + **1581 EN↔HT pairs** → committable federal pairs |
| NJ court glossary | EVAL-ONLY (state) | EVAL-ONLY legal probe pool (241 terms) |
| MA DESE IEP | EVAL-ONLY (state) | EVAL-ONLY education probe pool (200 labels) |
| BMC clinical glossary | EVAL-ONLY (courtesy) | EVAL-ONLY; **4.0% French-accent words** → tagged nonstandard_orthography |
| FILE_7167 | EVAL-ONLY (private hospital — Beverly Hospital / Beth Israel Lahey Health) | producer **Beverly Hospital (Beth Israel Lahey Health)** — not extracted |
| Freeman dictionary | QUARANTINE (copyrighted, Bryant C. Freeman) | not opened |

Contributor chain-of-custody: `corpus/contributors/family-contributor-1.md`.

## Red flags / walls encountered

- **VOA net-new (~2.25M) tripped the J0 red-flag gate** (< 5M). Proceeded under the user's "Full v0.2 + mix control" decision — see [corpus_v0_2_scoping.md](corpus_v0_2_scoping.md).
- **VOA is a broadcast outlet:** ~46% of `/a/` URLs are audio/video, ~34% of text articles are wire (dropped) — the crawl yield is bounded accordingly.
- **Bloom (sil-ai/bloom-lm)** remains **gated** (auto-grant, pending one click on the user's HF account); not yet ingested.
- No robots.txt wall hit (VOA `/a/` allowed; federal sites public).

## Nutrition label v2

| axis | value |
|---|---|
| Total unique tokens (kreyol-bpe) | 219,227,663 |
| Documents | 315,804 |
| Net-new vs v0.1 | 104,929,373 |
| Registers | 12 (children, encyclopedic, financial, government, health, immigration, journalism, legal, proverb, religious, tax, web_crawl) |
| Web-crawl share (raw) | 94.1% |
| Authored/register share (raw) | 5.9% |
| Religious cap | ≤2% enforced |
| Eval axes added | authored_eval_v2 (VOA temporal) + NJ/MA/BMC terminology probes |

**Honest caveat:** the large raw web-crawl share is by design (Pile-B volume for a data-limited model). The authored *voice* target is served by the mix weights + the register tail, not by raw composition. A true 30%-authored-by-composition corpus needs permission-route sources (AKA/Ayibopost/Healthy Roads), out of this workstream's clean-rights scope.

## Reproduce

```bash
cd ml && uv sync
uv run python -m corpus.corpus_index build
uv run python -m corpus.voa_crawl            # J1 (resumable; hours)
uv run python -m corpus.family               # J3
uv run python -m corpus.federal_pdfs harvest # J2 (after discovery)
uv run python -m corpus.small_wins all       # J4 Bib La / Konst / Storybooks
uv run python -m corpus.fineweb_ingest       # J4 fineweb survivors
uv run python -m corpus.build_v0_2           # J6b assemble
uv run python -m corpus.report_v0_2          # this report
```

Nothing under `ml/data/` is committed; the mined federal glossary pairs and the contributor record are the only new committable data artifacts.
